description: Convert standardized CLI tools into n8n community node packages

tools.help: List and inspect available CLI tools

list.help: List available CLI tools that can be converted to n8n nodes. Example: n8n-cli-tool-node-converter tools list n8n-cli-tool-node-converter tools list --table n8n-cli-tool-node-converter tools list --limit 10
list.usage_instructions: Use to browse all CLI tools available for conversion. Default limit is 100. Use --filter/-f for field:op:value filtering. Use --table/-t for formatted output.

get.help: Inspect a CLI tool's metadata (command groups, commands, parameters, credentials). Example: n8n-cli-tool-node-converter tools get brickowl n8n-cli-tool-node-converter tools get shippo --table
get.usage_instructions: Use to inspect a specific CLI tool before conversion. NAME is positional and required. Shows command groups, commands, parameters, and credential types. Use --table/-t for formatted output.

tools.usage_instructions: Tool inspection -- list available CLI tools and inspect their metadata (command groups, commands, parameters, credentials) before generating n8n nodes.

nodes.help: Generate and manage n8n node packages

generate.help: Generate an n8n node package from a CLI tool. Example: n8n-cli-tool-node-converter nodes generate brickowl n8n-cli-tool-node-converter nodes generate shippo --output-dir ./output n8n-cli-tool-node-converter nodes generate brickowl --force
generate.usage_instructions: Use to convert a CLI tool into an n8n community node package. CLI_NAME is positional and required. Use --output-dir/-o to override the default output directory. Use --force/-F to overwrite an existing package.

list.help: List previously generated n8n node packages. Example: n8n-cli-tool-node-converter nodes list n8n-cli-tool-node-converter nodes list --table
list.usage_instructions: Use to browse generated n8n node packages. Default limit is 100. Use --filter/-f for filtering. Use --table/-t for formatted output.

get.help: Get details for a specific generated n8n node package. Example: n8n-cli-tool-node-converter nodes get brickowl n8n-cli-tool-node-converter nodes get brickowl --table

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Package name or CLI tool name

get.usage_instructions: Use to view details of a generated package by NAME. Use --table/-t for formatted output.

nodes.usage_instructions: Node package management -- generate n8n community node packages from CLI tools, list generated packages, and get package details.

login.help: Configure authentication credentials. Prompts for required credentials based on the tool's authentication type. For OAuth authorization code flows, opens a browser for user consent.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to save credentials to

login.usage_instructions: Use `n8n-cli-tool-node-converter auth login` to configure authentication credentials. --profile/-p selects the profile to save. --force/-F clears existing credentials first. --credential-type/-c scopes authentication to one credential type.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to clear credentials from

logout.usage_instructions: Use `n8n-cli-tool-node-converter auth logout` to clear stored credentials for a profile.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to check (defaults to all profiles)

status.usage_instructions: Use `n8n-cli-tool-node-converter auth status` to verify converter configuration across profiles.

test.help: Test authentication by verifying credentials work across profiles.
test.usage_instructions: Use `n8n-cli-tool-node-converter auth test` to run live converter configuration checks.

list.help: List all profiles and show which is the default.

options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of profiles to return

options.name: --properties
options.help: Comma-separated list of fields to include

list.usage_instructions: Use `n8n-cli-tool-node-converter auth profiles list` to list saved profiles.

get.help: Get details for a specific profile.

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Profile name to get details for

get.usage_instructions: Use `n8n-cli-tool-node-converter auth profiles get` to inspect one profile.

create.help: Create a new profile from .env.example template.
create.usage_instructions: Use `n8n-cli-tool-node-converter auth profiles create` to create a new profile.

set-default.help: Set a profile as the default (IS_DEFAULT_PROFILE=1).

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Profile name to set as default

set-default.usage_instructions: Use `n8n-cli-tool-node-converter auth profiles set-default` to select the default profile.

delete.help: Delete a profile and its data.
delete.usage_instructions: Use `n8n-cli-tool-node-converter auth profiles delete` to remove a profile.

profiles.usage_instructions: Use `n8n-cli-tool-node-converter auth profiles` to manage named profiles.

auth.usage_instructions: Use `n8n-cli-tool-node-converter auth` to manage converter authentication and profiles.

usage_instructions: Use for converting CLI tools into n8n community node packages. Commands follow `n8n-cli-tool-node-converter <group> <action>` pattern. Configure tools/output directories via auth, inspect CLI tools via tools, and generate/manage node packages via nodes.
